courses.title: Introduction to Programming
courses.name: Introduction to Programming
courses.learning_outcomes: Understand fundamental programming concepts; Write clean and readable code; Debug and test simple programs; Apply problem-solving strategies
courses.content: Variables and data types; Control flow (if/else, loops); Functions and scope; Introduction to arrays and strings; Basic file I/O
courses.description: A foundational course covering core programming concepts using Python. Students will build small projects from the ground up.
courses.assessment: Written exam 40%; Programming assignments 40%; Lab participation 20%

courses.title: Data Structures and Algorithms
courses.name: Data Structures and Algorithms
courses.learning_outcomes: Implement common data structures; Analyse algorithm time and space complexity; Choose appropriate data structures for a given problem
courses.content: Linked lists; Stacks and queues; Trees and graphs; Sorting and searching algorithms; Big-O notation
courses.description: Covers the design and analysis of fundamental data structures and algorithms. Prerequisite for most upper-level CS courses.

courses.title: Database Systems
courses.name: Database Systems
courses.learning_outcomes: Design relational schemas; Write complex SQL queries; Understand transaction management; Apply normalisation techniques
courses.content: Entity-Relationship modelling; SQL (DDL & DML); Joins and subqueries; Normalisation (1NF-3NF); Indexing and query optimisation; Transactions and ACID properties
courses.description: An introduction to relational database theory and practice. Students will design schemas and implement full database applications.
courses.assessment: Project 40%; Midterm exam 30%; Weekly SQL exercises 30%

courses.title: Cloud Computing Fundamentals
courses.name: Cloud Computing Fundamentals
courses.learning_outcomes: Deploy applications on cloud platforms; Configure virtual machines and storage; Apply cloud security best practices
courses.content: Cloud service models (IaaS, PaaS, SaaS); AWS and Azure basics; Containerisation with Docker; Serverless architectures; Cloud cost management
courses.description: Introduces cloud computing concepts and hands-on practice with major cloud providers. Focus on practical deployment skills.

courses.title: Machine Learning
courses.name: Machine Learning
courses.learning_outcomes: Build and evaluate supervised and unsupervised models; Apply feature engineering techniques; Interpret model outputs
courses.content: Linear and logistic regression; Decision trees and random forests; Neural networks; Model evaluation metrics; Cross-validation; Bias-variance tradeoff
courses.description: A graduate-level treatment of machine learning theory and application. Students implement models from scratch and via scikit-learn.
courses.assessment: Research paper 30%; Implementation projects 40%; Final exam 30%
